1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
1.p: By downloading, installing, or using the Luma application ("Service"), you agree to abide by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to any of these terms, you should not use the application.

2.title: 2. Purpose of the Application
2.p: Luma is a platform designed to foster connections and serious relationships among people from different countries and cultures. All users are expected to maintain respectful conduct.

3.title: 3. Eligibility
3.p: To use Luma, you must be at least 18 years old and have full civil capacity. By creating an account, you declare and warrant that you meet these requirements.

4.title: 4. User Conduct
4.li1: Use the service for illegal or unauthorized purposes.
4.li2: Post offensive, defamatory, obscene content, or content that violates third-party rights.
4.li3: Harass, intimidate, or stalk other users.
4.li4: Create fake profiles or impersonate someone else.

5.title: 5. Security and Privacy
5.p: Your privacy is important to us. Please review our Privacy Policy to understand how we collect and use your data. We recommend caution when sharing personal information with other users.

6.title: 6. Modifications to the Service
6.p: We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the service at any time, temporarily or permanently, with or without prior notice.

7.title: 7. Contact
7.p: If you have questions about these terms, please contact us through the application's official channels.

1.title: 1. Introduction
1.p: Luma respects your privacy and is committed to protecting the personal data you share with us. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your information.

2.title: 2. Information We Collect
2.li1: Profile Information: Name, age, photos, nationality, and description.
2.li2: Usage Data: Interactions with other users, matches, and messages.
2.li3: Technical Data: IP address, device type, and operating system.
2.p: We collect information about your location and preferences to connect you with compatible profiles around the world.

3.title: 3. How We Use Your Data
3.li2: Suggest compatible matches based on your preferences and location.
3.li3: Ensure platform security and prevent fraud.
3.li4: Improve our services and develop new features.

4.title: 4. Information Sharing
4.p: We do not sell your personal data. We only share information:
4.li1: With other users according to the app's functionality (your public profile).
4.li2: When required by law or judicial authority.

5.title: 5. Data Security
5.p: We implemented technical and organizational security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction.

6.title: 6. Your Rights
6.p: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time through the application settings or by contacting us.

7.title: 7. Changes to this Policy
7.p: We may update this policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes through the application.

security.title: Child Safety Standards (CSAE)
security.alertBox: Luma maintains a zero-tolerance policy against any form of Child Sexual Abuse and Exploitation (CSAE).
security.introP: The safety of our community is our top priority. We are committed to combating child sexual exploitation online and work actively to prevent, detect, and remove any child abuse-related content from our platform.

1.title: 1. Zero Tolerance Policy
1.p1: It is strictly prohibited to publish, share, store, or solicit any content that involves:
1.li1: Sexual abuse of children or minors.
1.p2: Any user found violating these policies will have their account immediately and permanently banned, and the case will be reported to the relevant authorities.

2.title: 2. Cooperation with Authorities
2.p: Luma cooperates fully with law enforcement agencies and child protection organizations, including:
2.li1: NCMEC (National Center for Missing & Exploited Children): We proactively report any suspected cases of child exploitation via the CyberTipline.
2.li2: Local Authorities: We provide data and collaborate with investigations when requested or when we identify an imminent risk to a child.

3.title: 3. Reporting Mechanisms
3.p1: We encourage our community to report any suspicious behavior or content. Our users can report safety violations in the following ways:
3.li1: In-App: Use the "Report" option available on user profiles or specific posts.
3.li2: By Email: Contact our safety team directly at luma.app.contact@gmail.com.
3.p2: All reports are handled with priority and urgency.

4.title: 4. Content Moderation
4.p: We use a combination of technology and human moderation to protect our platform:
4.li1: Automated systems to detect keywords and suspicious patterns.
4.li2: Constant human review of reports and flagged profiles.
4.li3: Age verification to ensure all users are over 18 years old.

5.title: 5. Support Resources
5.p: If you or someone you know is in danger or needs help, please contact local authorities or use the channels below:
5.li1: Local Emergency Services: Call your local emergency number.

deleteAccount.title: Account and Data Deletion
deleteAccount.heroSubtitle: Learn how to request the deletion of your account on the Luma app

1.title: How to request deletion
1.intro: Luma values your privacy and offers full control over your data. If you wish to permanently delete your account and all associated data, follow the steps below:
1.step1Desc: Click the button below or send an email directly to luma.app.contact@gmail.com.
1.step2Desc: In the email subject, write "Account Deletion". In the body, provide the email address associated with your account on the application.
1.step3Desc: Our team will process your request and permanently remove your data within 7 business days.
1.btnBody: Hello, I would like to request the deletion of my account. My registered email is:

2.title: Which data gets deleted?
2.intro: Upon processing your request, the following data will be permanently removed from our servers:

3.title: Data Retention
3.intro: Some data may be retained temporarily or permanently only when required by law or for legitimate security purposes:
3.li1: Access Logs: Connection records (IP, date and time) are kept for the legal period required.
3.li2: Security: Data associated with banned accounts due to terms violation might be kept to prevent new unallowed accounts from being created.
